Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blackflame core]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — The Blackflame core rotates slowly without direction in rhythm with Lindon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon possesses a Blackflame core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's Blackflame core is reduced to a single smoldering red-and-black ember.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon's Blackflame core is empty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon tried to draw on his Blackflame core.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon refilled his Blackflame core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon is approaching the limit of his Blackflame core.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon pulls madra into his Blackflame core.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's Blackflame core was virtually untouched.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
